title: Modeling Lewy Body Disease with SNCA Triplication iPSC-Derived Cortical Organoids and Identifying Therapeutic Drugs
author: Jin, Yunjung
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the source code for the single-cell and single-nuclei RNA sequencing data analysis for the study   Modeling Lewy Body Disease with SNCA Triplication iPSC-Derived Cortical Organoids and Identifying Therapeutic Drugs   by Yunjung Jin et al.
steps_raw: This repository contains the source code for the single-cell and single-nuclei RNA sequencing data analysis for the study   Modeling Lewy Body Disease with SNCA Triplication iPSC-Derived Cortical Organoids and Identifying Therapeutic Drugs   by Yunjung Jin et al.
